name: claude-chat-history
description: Store and browse Claude Code conversations

scripts.setup: node -e "require('./db').query(require('fs').readFileSync('./schema.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{ console.log('Schema applied'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e=>{ console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.test: node tests/run-node-tests.js && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "*_test.py"
